title: Replace sync file I/O with async in route handlers (files, browse, notifications)
acceptance_criteria: files.ts: all fs.existsSync, fs.statSync, fs.readFileSync replaced with fs.promises equivalents
browse.ts:61,65,129 sync calls replaced with async equivalents
notifications.ts:38-43 sync I/O replaced with fs.promises
Promise.all used for batch stat operations where applicable
